# AGENT-CONTEXT.md — compact agent boot digest (hotam-spec-self)

This file is the compact entry point for an agent session — target < 15KB. It is a live-state pulse, a top-action shortlist, and an id+flag-only constitution index, NOT a substitute for the full reference docs. Full claims/WHY/assumptions, tension detail, and rejection history remain in the other docs/gen/*.md files below — those are reference-only, load them on demand, not at every boot.

### Live state (autogenerated by `hotam gen-spec` — do not hand-edit)

- **top action:** [P0] REFLECTION on `enforcement-gradient` — 42 SETTLED requirements are closeable debt (ENFORCEABLE, still PROSE/STRUCTURAL) — claimed but not guaranteed, soft context-debt. See docs/gen/UNENFORCED.md.
- **debt:** 161/236 SETTLED ENFORCED · 2 DRAFT · 0 OPEN · 42 closeable debt (ENFORCEABLE, still PROSE/STRUCTURAL)
- **graph:** 304 nodes (req+conflict+assumption); OP-director budget 150000 chars (CRYSTAL_CHARS measure) — resident crystal 0 chars (headroom 150000)
- **crystal:** OK — under 130000 char warn threshold (host cap 150000)
- context: UNMEASURED — measuring working-context requires host cooperation the framework will not touch (R-work-within-launch-dir); it measures only if the local stdin payload honestly carries ctx_pct — R-unmeasured-cipher-names-host-boundary

## Details on demand

- One requirement's full claim + WHY + assumptions: `hotam req show <id> --domain domains/hotam-spec-self`.
- Full requirement roster: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/REQUIREMENTS.md`.
- Tension clusters: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/TENSIONS.md`.
- Rejection history: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/HISTORY.md`.
- Enforcement gap detail: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/UNENFORCED.md`.
- Framework-internal atoms: `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/FRAMEWORK-INVARIANTS.md`.
- Review-freshness detail (which ids, how overdue): `hotam due --domain domains/hotam-spec-self`.

## docs/gen/ file index (which files do I actually need to read?)

MANDATORY (named directly in this domain's CLAUDE.md boot text — read essentially every session):
- `AGENT-CONTEXT.md` (this file) — compact boot digest.
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/REQUIREMENTS.md` — full requirement roster (LOCATE step).
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/TENSIONS.md` — conflict clusters (LOCATE step).
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/UNENFORCED.md` — enforcement-gap detail behind the top-action line.
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/FRAMEWORK-INVARIANTS.md` — framework-internal atoms behind the Constitution index.

REFERENCE (load on demand for a specific task, not at boot):
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/CONSTITUTION.md`, `GLOSSARY.md`, `REPO-MAP.md` — narrative expansions of sections already summarized above.
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/atoms-operator.md`, `atoms-substrate.md`, `atoms-discipline.md`, `atoms-check.md` — per-category atom detail.
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/live-state.md` — the same pulse this file's Live-state section already carries, standalone.
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/OPEN.md` — open-question detail behind the OPEN status.
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/thinking/<slug>.md` — one deep-dive per §-section, loaded only when a §-anchor needs its full Canon/Narrative/Why.
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/tools/<tool>.md` — one purpose doc per tool, loaded only when working with that tool.

ARCHIVAL (historical/self-contained — read only when investigating past decisions, never at boot):
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/HISTORY.md` — REJECTED + DECIDED change-log; anti-relitigation lookup only.
- `domains/hotam-spec-self/docs/gen/graph.json` — read-only regenerated snapshot of this domain's graph.json, kept byte-identical by R-drift-structurally-impossible for archival/portability; no tool reads it back.
